commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Nextcloud Talk structured webhook body parsing, explicit structured mention matching, effective-body dispatch, automatic source reply delivery for group replies, focused mention parsing tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main passes the raw `object.content` string through command and mention gating while upstream Talk sends a JSON envelope, and group source replies can remain in `message_tool_only` without a plugin-local override. I did not run a live Nextcloud server in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This is a valid recent external bug-fix PR, but the branch is dirty against current main and needs maintainer review plus a rebase/port onto the latest Nextcloud Talk inbound path rather than cleanup closure or an automated repair lane.
